content_goal: Instantly communicate GRM is the premium local media company for Marion County. Establish authority and warmth simultaneously.
visual_treatment: Full-bleed Marion County hero image — 1-Horse-Country-1.jpeg (two horses grazing at golden hour with Spanish moss) is the primary recommendation. GRM logo SVG top-left at 220px wide. Tagline below: Locally rooted. Professionally grown. in Nunito. Optional dark overlay only if white headline text is placed over the photo.
copy_direction: One clear headline stating what GRM is. Not what it does — what it IS. Subheadline names both publications. No jargon. No exclamation points.
conversion_goal: Scroll to learn more or direct CTA to publication that matches visitor intent — agents go to Closing Table, homeowners go to Front Porch.
notes: Three-brand hierarchy must be visible immediately: GRM parent, CT and FP as children. Mobile: stack vertically, logo above headline. Hero image must pass the Marion County test — flat terrain, Florida vegetation.

content_goal: Show both publications side by side so visitors self-select their path. Agents see Closing Table, homeowners see Front Porch.
visual_treatment: Two-column card layout on desktop. Each card has publication cover comp image, publication name in Comfortaa, one-line description in Nunito, and teal CTA button. Near-black cards on cream background. The Closing Table card uses CT cover comp (aerial neighborhood). Front Porch card uses FP cover comp (family on porch swing).
copy_direction: Closing Table: For top-producing agents who want to be known in Marion County. Front Porch: For new homeowners discovering where to go first. Short and punchy — no more than one sentence each.
conversion_goal: Click through to dedicated publication page. Self-selection reduces bounce — right audience reaches right content.
photo_recommendation: Use GRM-FP-Cvr-Comp for Front Porch card and CT cover aerial image for Closing Table card.
notes: Mobile: stack cards vertically. Equal visual weight. Both use teal CTA buttons. Never let one publication dominate over the other visually.

content_goal: Differentiate GRM from generic real estate marketing. Explain the value of premium local media reaching two specific audiences.
visual_treatment: Three feature cards on cream background. Comfortaa header. Teal accent line above each card. Nunito body. No icons — use concise bold stat numbers instead where appropriate.
copy_direction: Three points: (1) We know this market — Marion County is the number one fastest-growing metro in America. (2) Two distinct audiences — the agents closing deals and the homeowners arriving every week. (3) Premium editorial — agents frame it, homeowners keep it. Not junk mail.
conversion_goal: Build enough trust to click to a publication page or the Advertise page.
photo_recommendation: No photography needed here — let the typography and data do the work.
notes: Keep to exactly 3 points. Each card: bold stat or short label plus two sentences of Nunito body. No walls of text. Teal accent line above card is the visual anchor.

content_goal: Social proof from real agents and businesses. Show GRM is already trusted in the community.
visual_treatment: Pull quote cards with attribution in Nunito. Teal left accent line on cream background OR near-black cards with white text. No stock headshots — use real photos if available, otherwise attribution text only.
copy_direction: Real quotes from real people with real titles and Marion County locations. Format: Name comma Title comma Location. Never attribute quotes to GRM itself.
conversion_goal: Reinforce decision to explore further. Trust drives conversion on Advertise page.
photo_recommendation: Use Ron or Cameron photos from the shoot if needed to humanize. DSC01296 (Ron outdoor warm smile) or DSC01234 (Cameron studio).
notes: "Max 2-3 visible at once. Rotate between agent-facing and homeowner-facing if possible."

content_goal: Tell the GRM origin story. Establish credibility as a media company built by someone who knows this industry.
visual_treatment: Two-column layout: text left, team photo right. Or full-width with Ron and Cameron photos as circular crops above their bios. Cream background. Near-black text. Teal accent on section header.
copy_direction: 30 years in sales and media publishing. Left VP of Sales at City Lifestyle to build something locally rooted in Ocala. Cameron as Sales Director and co-founder. The mission: give Marion County a media company that is actually from here.
conversion_goal: Build enough trust to click Advertise or reach out directly.
photo_recommendation: DSC01489 (Ron and Cameron together outdoors — primary team photo). DSC01296 (Ron solo). DSC01234 (Cameron solo).
notes: This section should feel warm and human — people should feel like they are meeting Ron and Cameron, not reading a corporate about page.

content_goal: Convert agents and local businesses into advertising clients. Primary revenue CTA for the website.
visual_treatment: Teal background section with white Comfortaa headline OR near-black section. Bold headline. Clear pricing reference or inquiry button. Premium feel — never salesy or desperate.
copy_direction: Reach the agents and homeowners who matter most in Marion County. Premium placement in publications read by your target audience. The math: $530/month equals $17/day in front of 500 agents and service companies.
conversion_goal: Click to Advertise page or inquiry form. This is the money section.
photo_recommendation: Possible: aerial Marion County neighborhood shot as section background with dark overlay and white type.
notes: Must feel premium and confident. No discount language. No urgency tactics. Confident media company energy. One clear CTA button.

content_goal: Consistent brand anchor on every page. Links, social, legal.
visual_treatment: Near-black #1A1A1A background. White Nunito text. GRM logo SVG left. Publication links center. Social handles right. Teal rule line above footer separates it from page content.
copy_direction: getrootedmedia.com visible. Link to both publications, Advertise page, and Contact. Social: @getrootedmedia @ClosingTable.mag @FrontPorch.mag
conversion_goal: Keep visitors in ecosystem. Every footer link leads deeper into GRM.
notes: Match the publication footer pattern from Em Agency comps: logo left, links center/right, teal rule above. Consistent across all pages.
